find.title: Find People & Resources
find.subtitle: Search simultaneously across multiple trusted humanitarian organizations.
find.noResults: No results found for "{{query}}". Try a different search term.

report.title: Report Information
report.subtitle: Report missing persons, damaged buildings and emergency updates through trusted organizations.
report.redirectTitle: Continue on the official reporting platform
report.redirectText: To ensure data integrity and avoid fragmentation, GeoResponde does not store reports directly. We will redirect you to the authoritative organization's platform where your report will be properly handled and verified.

mission.title: Mission
mission.p1: GeoResponde connects scientific intelligence and humanitarian information into a unified operational picture during disasters.
mission.p2: Instead of creating another isolated database, GeoResponde federates trusted information from existing organizations while preserving data ownership.

whyExists.title: Why GeoResponde Exists
whyExists.p4: Scientists and responders often work with disconnected systems.
whyExists.p5: GeoResponde exists to connect those worlds.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.p1: GeoResponde is developed as an open-source project because disaster response benefits from transparency, collaboration and interoperability.
openSource.p2: Everyone can inspect the code. Organizations remain owners of their own data.

principles.title: Our Principles
principles.p1_text: We connect existing systems instead of creating competing databases.
principles.p2_text: Organizations always remain the authoritative source.
principles.p4_text: Scientific intelligence should improve operational decisions.

disclaimer.title: Data Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: GeoResponde does not own humanitarian records.
disclaimer.p2: GeoResponde federates publicly available or provider-authorized information.
disclaimer.p3: Every provider remains responsible for its own data.
disclaimer.p4: Critical information should always be confirmed with the originating organization.
